title: Swaggiest Blocks Ever
body:
Remember when you built a house made of diamonds in creative? Filled with emerald, gold, and iron blocks?

Remember that April Fools update that had Netherite Stairs?

Now you can take that craziness to the next level! This mod adds building block types for Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond and Netherite!

The types are: Stairs, Slabs, Walls, Bricks, Doors, Trapdoors, Brick Slabs, Brick Stairs, and Brick Walls!

This is my first mod and the only mod I intend on making simply because I wanted this in vanilla MC

Feel free to suggest other types of blocks :)

Made with MCreator
